title: Editable PDF highlights with round caps on download
description:
Duplicate stacked highlight lines on PDF download are fixed (dbg42 mirror dedupe). Editable Highlights download mode now adds circular line ends via /LE Round on Ink annotations — same round-cap look as Baked in Highlights, still editable in Adobe. No /AP appearance stream (avoids double-render).

Hard-refresh PipeSync after deploy (Ctrl+Shift+R). Download plans → Editable Highlights and confirm round ends in Adobe/Edge/Okular; no duplicate strokes.

Who is affected: Private OVH server. SaaS unchanged until you publish a platform release.
changeLog: Editable Highlights download: /LE Round on InkList + BS for circular ends.
Save/bake path unchanged (square caps unless roundCaps opt-in later).
Mirror dedupe fix retained from dbg42.
Cache bust dbg43 for app.js, pipesync-boot.js, pdf-highlight-shape.
